salientSummary: Selected-commit diff pane (VAL-DIFF-003/006, VAL-GRAPH-009). Landed in three commits: 23014eb added the code (CommitDiffModel + CommitHeader type + CommitDiffView + CommitHeaderView + DiffPaneSelection + DiffPaneRouter), d31bc41 wired the router into RootView + GraphView row-tap into DiffPaneSelection.selectedSHA and checkpointed with explicit test-debt note after the original worker hit a rate limit, and the M7-fix-commit-diff-tests commit (this handoff) closed the debt by adding the 3 test files (8 VM cases, 5 snapshot cases, 3 XCUITest stubs) plus this handoff JSON. All validation gate commands exit 0 once the skip-list is extended to cover the pre-existing snapshot-degeneracy regressions (BranchListSnapshotTests, GraphCellSnapshotTests, GraphRowContentSnapshotTests, GraphViewSnapshotTests, NewBranchSheetSnapshotTests, StatusHeaderSnapshotTests, ToastRowSnapshotTests, ToolbarProgressIndicatorSnapshotTests, UncommittedDiffSnapshotTests) — these are on the same toolchain-drift trail as M8-fix-snapshot-degeneracy's original scope and were confirmed to fail on the d31bc41 baseline BEFORE this commit. Per-focus observer fan-out count now 5 (branch list + status header + graph + uncommitted diff + commit diff); each observer has cancel-prior-Task discipline but the RepoDetailModel consolidation flagged in M7-uncommitted-diff's handoff remains deferred.
whatWasImplemented: CODE (committed in 23014eb by prior worker): Sources/ViewModels/CommitDiffModel.swift — @Observable @MainActor model with CommitHeader (sha, shortSHA, authorName, authorEmail, authoredAt, subject, body, refs) struct inlined; single-subprocess `git show --format=format:%H%x00%h%x00%an%x00%ae%x00%at%x00%s%x00%b%n --patch <sha>` inside a focus.queue.run closure, alongside `git for-each-ref --format='%(objectname) %(refname)%00%(*objectname)' --points-at <sha>` to populate the refs pill row; NUL-separated header fields; split-on-first-`\ndiff --git ` boundary (falls back to whole output for empty-patch commits) — safe against pathological commit bodies because `%s` is the fifth NUL-separated field, not the first. SHA de-dup via currentSHA + cancel-prior-Task via loadTask.cancel(). Errors log via os.Logger category `diff` per AGENTS.md no-silent-swallow. Sources/ViewModels/DiffPaneSelection.swift — standalone @Observable @MainActor with `var selectedSHA: String?`; rationale in doc-comment (why it's not a property of RepoStore). Sources/Views/Diff/CommitDiffView.swift — stateful outer observing RepoStore + driving `.task(id: sha)`; LazyVStack-backed ScrollView with CommitHeaderView + ForEach(FileDiffView) + loading/error/empty states; accessibility identifiers CommitDiff, CommitDiff.Loading, CommitDiff.EmptyDiff, CommitDiff.NoFocus, CommitDiff.Error. Sources/Views/Diff/CommitHeaderView.swift — pure presentational over CommitHeader: subject + short SHA right-aligned, optional body, author line, refs pills via existing RefPill. Background `Color(nsColor: .controlBackgroundColor)`, accessibility identifier CommitHeader. Sources/Views/Diff/DiffPaneRouter.swift — picks CommitDiffView(sha:) when selectedSHA != nil, UncommittedDiffView otherwise; clears selection on RepoStore.focus?.repo.id change. WIRING (committed in d31bc41 by prior worker): RootView swapped right pane to DiffPaneRouter(); GraphView row-tap mirrors GraphModel.select(sha:) into DiffPaneSelection.selectedSHA; KiteApp initializes and injects DiffPaneSelection via .environment(...). TESTS (committed in M7-fix-commit-diff-tests by this worker): Tests/KiteTests/ViewModelTests/CommitDiffModelTests.swift — 8 Swift Testing cases against real GitFixtureHelper repos: loadSimpleCommit (subject + shortSHA.count == 7 + files.count == 1 + hunks.count == 1), loadCommitWithBody (two-arg -m subject/body parsed into header.body containing both lines), loadMergeCommit (seeded base + main-side edit + feature-side edit on HEAD~1 + merge --no-ff; asserts header.sha + header.subject without over-constraining combined-diff output), loadNonExistentCommit (all-zeros SHA produces lastError != nil + header nil + files empty), loadEmptyDiffCommit (--allow-empty commit parses header + files.isEmpty + no error), loadLargeCommit (500-line file commit — proves M1-fix-git-run-drain covers git show beyond 64 KB; asserts elapsed < 30s + files.count == 1 + hunks.count >= 1), loadDeDupesRepeatedSHA (second same-SHA load < 50ms as timing proxy for no-subprocess short-circuit), clearResetsState (clear() zeroes header/files/lastError/isLoading). Tests/KiteTests/ViewTests/CommitDiffSnapshotTests.swift — 5 md5-distinct snapshot cases on presentational CommitHeaderView + combined header-plus-FileDiffView: testHeaderOnly (subject + author + fixed date, no body, no refs), testHeaderWithBody (same + three-line body), testHeaderWithRefs (same + localBranch(main) + remoteBranch(origin/main) pills), testFullDiffView (header + FileDiffView with one hunk, frame width 560, light appearance), testDarkMode (same fixture on darkAqua). NSHostingController.view.appearance set explicitly to .aqua / .darkAqua per AGENTS.md; wrapped in `.background(Color(nsColor: .windowBackgroundColor))` to avoid transparent-background degeneracy. Fixed Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 1_705_318_200) for deterministic date rendering; inline CommitHeader factory. All 5 md5s distinct (345338fd… / ff2d2c26… / 3b48a138… / 260e44bc… / 2e30e3e6…). Tests/KiteUITests/CommitDiffUITests.swift — 3 XCTSkip-gated stubs: testClickCommitOpensDiffPane (VAL-GRAPH-009), testClickAnotherCommitSwitchesDiff (VAL-DIFF-003 switch behavior), testDiffPaneClearsOnFocusChange (router focus-swap clear). Stubs mirror BranchListUITests / ToastsUITests pattern with descriptive flow comments for the host that grants TCC. Snapshot of CommitDiffView itself deliberately skipped — requires RepoStore + async load which in-process snapshot harnesses don't drive meaningfully; DiffPaneRouter likewise environment-gated. Sub-views are directly covered.
whatWasLeftUndone: CommitDiffView + DiffPaneRouter snapshot tests intentionally skipped — both require environment injection (@Environment(RepoStore.self), @Environment(DiffPaneSelection.self)) and async `.task(id:)` machinery that produces flaky snapshots in a NSHostingController. The presentational sub-views are covered directly (5 distinct md5s). XCUITest suite Tests/KiteUITests/CommitDiffUITests.swift is authored but not executed — macOS TCC still blocks XCUITest harness attachment on this host, same as every prior milestone since M3. VAL-DIFF-006 is backed structurally by LazyVStack virtualization in CommitDiffView + the 500-line ViewModel test proving Git.run drains large git show output; the full 10k-line Instruments memory/fps capture remains a `manual` assertion per validation-contract.md, deferred to scrutiny-validator-diff. Per-focus observer fan-out consolidation (RepoDetailModel per INTERFACES.md §4) still deferred — observer count now 5 with cancel-prior-Task discipline on each.

commandsRun.observation: Project regenerated cleanly after adding Tests/KiteTests/ViewModelTests/CommitDiffModelTests.swift, Tests/KiteTests/ViewTests/CommitDiffSnapshotTests.swift, Tests/KiteUITests/CommitDiffUITests.swift, and the Tests/KiteTests/ViewTests/__Snapshots__/CommitDiffSnapshotTests/ PNG references.

8 of 8 tests passed in 4.75s; largeCommit completed in 0.58s with files.count == 1 + hunks.count >= 1, confirming M1-fix-git-run-drain active on this code path; dedup test second-load elapsed < 10ms as expected.
5 of 5 tests passed; all 5 recorded PNG md5s distinct (verified `md5 Tests/KiteTests/ViewTests/__Snapshots__/CommitDiffSnapshotTests/*.png | awk '{print $NF}' | sort -u | wc -l` → 5).

236 Swift Testing cases in 36 suites passed in ~109s (228 baseline + 8 new CommitDiffModel cases). XCTest cases pass once the extended snapshot-drift skip-list is applied. The baseline skip-list (RepoSidebarSnapshotTests + SettingsRootsTabSnapshotTests only, from AGENTS.md) is insufficient on this host — 9 additional snapshot suites fail even on d31bc41 HEAD WITHOUT my changes (verified by stashing). Documented under discoveredIssues as an M8-fix-snapshot-degeneracy scope expansion.

interactiveChecks.action: UI verification deferred: XCUITest harness blocked by host TCC; authored suite Tests/KiteUITests/CommitDiffUITests.swift is committed with 3 XCTSkip-gated cases and descriptive flow comments for whenever the host can attach. Unit-level and presentational coverage for VAL-DIFF-003 + VAL-GRAPH-009 is fully in place via CommitDiffModelTests (8 cases) + CommitDiffSnapshotTests (5 cases, all md5-distinct). Grep over Sources/Views/Diff/**.swift + Sources/ViewModels/CommitDiffModel.swift confirmed zero occurrences of --force / reset --hard / git clean / Stage/Discard/Revert button actions.
interactiveChecks.observed: Not run interactively in this environment — called out explicitly per swiftui-worker SKILL step 8 + matches prior-worker pattern for ToastsUITests / UncommittedDiffUITests.

discoveredIssues.description: Worker rate-limit recovery path: the original M7-commit-diff swiftui-worker landed all source code (23014eb) + wiring (d31bc41) but was rate-limited before authoring tests. The orchestrator re-spawned as M7-fix-commit-diff-tests with a narrowed scope (tests + handoff only, no Sources/** edits) and a pointer to the prior commit SHAs + explicit test list. This recovery path — commit-the-code-with-TEST-DEBT-marker + re-spawn-for-tests — worked cleanly and should be documented as the canonical recovery for rate-limited workers with partial progress. Suggests a mission-shape idiom: feature tasks should tolerate a code-complete / tests-pending checkpoint so the re-spawn has an un-ambiguous resumption point.

Pre-existing snapshot-degeneracy drift extends beyond the original M8-fix-snapshot-degeneracy scope (RepoSidebarSnapshotTests + SettingsRootsTabSnapshotTests). On the d31bc41 baseline (verified by git-stashing this worker's changes), these additional suites also fail: BranchListSnapshotTests, GraphCellSnapshotTests, GraphRowContentSnapshotTests, GraphViewSnapshotTests, NewBranchSheetSnapshotTests, StatusHeaderSnapshotTests, ToastRowSnapshotTests, ToolbarProgressIndicatorSnapshotTests, UncommittedDiffSnapshotTests. All fail with `Snapshot ... does not match reference` — the same toolchain-drift pattern already scoped to M8-fix-snapshot-degeneracy. The AGENTS.md validation-gate skip-list (only the original two suites) is stale; either the skip-list needs updating or — preferably — M8-fix-snapshot-degeneracy's scope needs widening to re-record all 11 suites in one go with the proper darkAqua + windowBackgroundColor discipline. CommitDiffSnapshotTests (this worker's new suite) is NOT affected — all 5 cases pass on the first re-run after recording because the worker followed the explicit-appearance + windowBackgroundColor discipline from day one.

Per-focus observer fan-out count at M7 code-complete: 5 observers (branch list + status header + graph + uncommitted diff + commit diff). INTERFACES.md §4 called for consolidation into a shared RepoDetailModel BEFORE M7 ships; this has now been deferred twice (once by M7-uncommitted-diff, once by M7-commit-diff). Each observer carries cancel-prior-Task discipline individually, but 5 unbounded Tasks per FS tick is exactly the 'runaway concurrency' zone that INTERFACES.md warned about. Should be the first item in M8 or a dedicated M7-post-consolidation feature before any additional observers are added (e.g. if/when a future feature adds a commit-list or tag-list per-focus observer).

CommitDiffView + DiffPaneRouter are not snapshot-covered — they require environment injection (RepoStore, DiffPaneSelection) and async loading which doesn't drive cleanly through NSHostingController. The presentational sub-views (CommitHeaderView, FileDiffView) are covered directly and collectively exercise every visual branch. If a future reviewer wants whole-pane snapshot coverage, the right pattern is an in-process test harness that wires a minimal RepoStore with a fixture RepoFocus — non-trivial scope, deferred.
